# jamfschool_user_group (Resource)

Manages a Jamf School user group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a user group with Jamf School Teacher enabled.
resource "jamfschool_user_group" "example" {
  name                = "Teaching Staff"
  description         = "All teaching staff members"
  jamf_school_teacher = "allow"
  jamf_parent         = "deny"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the group.
- `jamf_parent` (String) Jamf Parent feature status. Allowed values: allow, deny, inherit.
- `jamf_school_teacher` (String) Jamf School Teacher feature status. Allowed values: allow, deny, inherit.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID this group belongs to. Changing this value will recreate the resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier of the group.
- `user_count` (Number) Number of users in the group.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Copyright Jamf Software LLC 2026
# SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0

# User groups can be imported by their numeric ID
terraform import jamfschool_user_group.example 456
```
